goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'stansted airport'.
The train should 'arrive by 17:15' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'departure time', and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and postcode
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from stansted airport
The train should arrive by 17:15 and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get travel time, departure time, and train ID
